item.title: The Man Who Wanted To Become TV's 'Dexter'
item.description: A factual look at a man influenced by the TV series ‘Dexter,’ exploring his actions, motives, and the investigation that followed.

media:content.media:title: The Man Who Wanted To Become TV's 'Dexter'
media:content.media:description: A factual look at a man influenced by the TV series ‘Dexter,’ exploring his actions, motives, and the investigation that followed.

item.title: The Dad Who Took Revenge for His Son in Live Television
item.description: A father confronted a situation involving his son during a live broadcast, sharing his perspective and the events as they unfolded on air.

media:content.media:title: The Dad Who Took Revenge for His Son in Live Television
media:content.media:description: A father confronted a situation involving his son during a live broadcast, sharing his perspective and the events as they unfolded on air.

item.title: A Case That Shocked Mothers Across The World
item.description: A factual look at a widely reported case that drew attention and concern from parents globally, based on verified information.

media:content.media:title: A Case That Shocked Mothers Across The World
media:content.media:description: A factual look at a widely reported case that drew attention and concern from parents globally, based on verified information.

item.title: They Denied Baby Dylan Groves The Life He Deserved
item.description: An examination of the circumstances that prevented Dylan Groves from receiving the care and opportunities he needed, told with respect and clarity.

media:content.media:title: They Denied Baby Dylan Groves The Life He Deserved
media:content.media:description: An examination of the circumstances that prevented Dylan Groves from receiving the care and opportunities he needed, told with respect and clarity.
